# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Language
- All responses MUST be in Korean (한국어)
- Code review comments MUST be written in Korean
- Technical terms may be kept in English when appropriate

## Code Review Focus
- Follow the code style and conventions in `.claude/rules/06-code-style.md`
- Check indentation (2 spaces, not tabs)
- Verify error handling completeness
- Ensure functions are small (<50 lines)
- Check for proper Korean/English comments per style guide
- Verify commit messages follow Korean format: `[카테고리]: 변경 내용`
